title: Bolsius Basic Candles for Decoration, Wax, Ivory, Single Candle Size: H 11.8 cm Ø5.8 cm, 12 Units
features: Candle with "RAL Quality Mark"; is an official European quality standard that provides guarantee on the raw materials used in candles and in the burning property; products with this certification guarantee the health and safety of our consumers
Easy to use; cut the wick to a height of 1 cm.
Retains colour and shape throughout the burn time; the candle burns low smoke and has a minimum of dripping
Made in EU; made in Europe
description: Product Description Basic waxes and/or table waxes - on an elegantly set table, candles cannot be missed. Classic size with smooth surface and high quality and perfect burning. Ivory colour. Safety Warning Never leave burning candle unattended. Keep the candle away from children and pets. Leave at least 5cm gap between two lit candles. Keep the burning candle away from flammable products such as curtains and fabrics. Do not place the burning candle between drafts. Keep away from heat. Keep the wick at a height not exceeding 0.5cm. Blow out the candle with the appropriate candle extinguisher. Be careful not to drop matches and debris over the lit candle. Remove the wrap before using the product. Place the product only on heat-resistant surfaces.

specifications_table.Occasion: Anniversary, Christmas, Housewarming, New Year, Winter Holidays
